headline: Is ServiceNow’s Strong Q1, AI Push, and Google Cloud Tie-Up Altering The Investment Case For ServiceNow (NOW)?
summary: In late April 2026, ServiceNow reported Q1 revenue of US$3.77 billion with higher net income, raised its full-year subscription revenue outlook, and advanced its AI-native platform through new industry solutions, including manufacturing, and expanded partnerships with Google Cloud and Simplify Alpha amid heightened regulatory and cost pressures. An interesting aspect is how ServiceNow is using agentic AI and tightly integrated partner solutions to automate complex, regulated workflows across...
